purpose: Machine-readable external-reference backlog for broad E5 RF port/S-parameter validation. This is separate from the release slow-shard manifest: it tracks which port families still need external solver/reference evidence, preferably as independent VESSL jobs.
completion_rule: Broad all-port E5 requires every required family to have current_status=broad_e5_passed, required_scope=broad_e5, existing reference/YAML paths present, at least one passed E4/E4-enabling external S-parameter comparison artifact, at least one passed broad E4 external S-parameter comparison artifact that is not merely E4-enabling/narrow, and at least one passed broad-E5 mesh/frequency/geometry envelope artifact.

requirements.recommended_reference: openEMS or equivalent full-wave two-port lumped/cavity reference with matched/open/short/load cases
missing_evidence: broad external full-wave calibrated lumped-port S11/S21 reference over matched/open/short/load cases
mesh/frequency/geometry envelope against the external reference
requirements.notes: M13/M14 provide analytic extractor and internal replay/passivity evidence. M33 adds one narrow rfx/openEMS two-port PEC-box magnitude comparison, and M47 adds a three-case rfx/openEMS PEC-box position sweep. M56 reran those three M47 PEC-box cases as independent VESSL jobs and aggregated their passed case artifacts; this validates the slow-sim parallel path but does not broaden the physics envelope beyond narrow PEC-box E4-enabling evidence. Broad calibrated-port E5 still requires matched/open/short/load external fixtures and a larger mesh/frequency/geometry envelope.

requirements.recommended_reference: openEMS/HFSS/Meep probe-fed patch or two-probe reference with absolute S11/S21 calibration
missing_evidence: nonuniform/shadow path promotion evidence if public claims include it
requirements.notes: M12/M15 replay the current midpoint-cell convention. M32 adds a narrow probe-fed patch OpenEMS S11 magnitude comparison, but broad absolute wire-port calibration remains blocked.
Existing openEMS evidence supports the narrow laplace/quasi-TEM lane only.

requirements.recommended_reference: MEEP/OpenEMS/Palace branch, multimode, and nonuniform waveguide reference set
missing_evidence: branch/T-junction or arbitrary multiport waveguide reference geometry
requirements.notes: Existing M4 evidence is E5-narrow for the rectangular-guide envelope with external MEEP/OpenEMS/Palace references. 2026-05-26 multi-band flux extension: five broad-E5 envelopes (WR-28 Ka, WR-62 Ku, WR-15 V, WR-340 S, WR-10 W) pass vs analytic Airy using compute_waveguide_s_matrix(normalize='flux') — power-flux extraction (extract_waveguide_s_matrix_flux) that resolves both the normalize=False noise floor (~0.06) and the normalize=True path-length-mismatch unitarity violation. Per-band max |S11| diff: WR-28 0.025, WR-62 0.011, WR-15 0.041, WR-340 0.008, WR-10 0.010 (all 4/4 cases, unitarity within +/-0.05 %p). Recipe in docs/guides/sparameter_support_matrix.md; trail in docs/research_notes/20260526_waveguide_flux_silver_bullet.md. Computed on VESSL gpu-rtx4090 (run 369367239898 + WR-28 L=1mm rerun 369367239918).

requirements.recommended_reference: openEMS/HFSS coaxial matched/short/open/load reference at a calibrated TEM reference plane
missing_evidence: matched / open / load termination gates against the new Simulation.compute_coaxial_s_matrix(...) API (PEC-short |S11| ≥ 0.9 calibration target now passes via tests/test_coaxial_s_matrix.py::test_pec_short_yields_full_reflection_calibration_target)
broad external full-wave coax reference over matched/short/open/load cases
mesh/frequency/geometry envelope against the external reference
requirements.notes: M21 is gap replay only. M35 adds a narrow rfx/openEMS coaxial-gap magnitude comparison, but it is not calibrated TEM reference-plane evidence and does not promote add_coaxial_port(...) S-parameters. M61 adds a synthetic TEM reference-plane V/I extraction oracle with max_s11_abs_diff 1.04e-8, reducing the calibration-helper layer. M62 adds a synthetic Cartesian field-plane adapter oracle with max_s11_abs_diff 8.29e-6, reducing the DFT-plane adapter layer. M63 captures real FDTD DFT planes and routes them through the M61/M62 replay path, but it is blocked by near-zero transverse TEM V/I at the sampled plane and plane/gap S11 max_abs_diff 4.996. M64 sweeps 11 z-planes from pin tip to gap and finds 0 passed planes; best plane/gap S11 max_abs_diff is 0.628 and best signal score is 1.25e-16, so the blocker is not just a single-plane selection issue. M65 identifies structural causes: axial/normal source component and no PEC annular outer-shell cells in the sampled default stamp. M66 fixes the annular outer-shell stamp (12/32 shell-band cells now PEC), but the axial source blocker remains and the post-fix sweep still has 0/11 passing planes with best plane/gap S11 max_abs_diff 0.996. M67 demonstrates a distributed transverse E/M plane-source prototype can produce nonzero TEM-plane V/I with max |S11| 0.168, but it is not the public add_coaxial_port API, not an external full-wave reference, and not a broad E5 envelope. M72 promoted the M67 plane-source prototype into the public Simulation.compute_coaxial_s_matrix(...) API and the 9-test tests/test_coaxial_s_matrix.py suite (schema, family-routing rejection, Z_TEM identity, amplitude-scale invariance); per-frequency |S11| was not yet calibrated against analytic PEC-cavity reflection. M73 unblocks the calibration: (a) wires the missing setup_coaxial_port call into compute_coaxial_s_matrix so the PEC pin / PTFE / PEC outer shell are actually stamped (the previous M72 ran the source in pure vacuum), (b) restructures build_coaxial_tem_plane_source_specs as a proper TFSF equivalent-currents pair (Yee-staggered e_inc/h_inc with Δt = dt/2 + dz·sqrt(εr)/(2c), spatial half-cell offset between E and H source planes, cross-coupling between H sources and the E mode profile, local Z_med = sqrt(μ/ε) for the h_inc normalisation, εr in coeff_e for the dielectric cb, source-cell radial filter [pin_radius, shell_inner] so cells don't fall inside the M66 PEC shell), (c) adds the port-direction-aware current_sign in extract_coaxial_plane_vi_from_dft so the V/I extractor convention matches the source's forward direction. The xfail strict marker on the PEC-short calibration test is now removed and the test passes at the bumped fixture freq_max=20 GHz (gives ~1 PTFE cell of resolution; the original 10 GHz had 0.47 cells of PTFE which cannot support a discrete coax TEM mode).

requirements.recommended_reference: RCWA and/or external full-wave FSS/RIS reference over scan angle and polarization
missing_evidence: RCWA or external full-wave FSS/RIS reference
promoted modal S-parameter API if public claim is desired
requirements.notes: M18/M20 cover modal bookkeeping and one small FDTD DFT-plane replay. M38 adds an empty-space analytic-null S11 comparison. M44 adds a non-empty homogeneous dielectric-slab analytic oracle. M49 adds a narrow non-empty rfx-FDTD slab/raw-DFT-plane vs analytic reflection magnitude comparison (E2/E3-enabling only). RCWA/external periodic-cell evidence remains blocked.

requirements.recommended_reference: openEMS/Palace quasi-TEM planar-port reference set per family
requirements.notes: M39/M45 add quasi-TEM analytic Z0/beta point checks plus parameter-sweep envelope templates for representative stripline/CPW/microstrip-launch families. The API is still planned and not promoted; raw V/I replay, external references, and E5 envelopes remain blocked.
